episodes.title: Cult Red Flags | MAGA
episodes.description:
A series on MAGA and cult psychology — not as opinion, but as applied social science. Eight red flags. All documented. All real. #PoliticalCult #CultPsychology #MAGA #PoliticalScience #CivicEducation

Academic Dissent applies criminology, political science, and sociology frameworks to the institutions and movements shaping American life. Three master's degrees. No filter.
